# Beach House Moving
> The owners are the movers. Licensed. Insured. Locally owned on the Emerald Coast.

Beach House Moving is a locally owned, owner-operated moving and storage company serving the Florida Panhandle. Florida Mover Registration #IM4125. Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Phone: (850) 842-1962. Website: https://beachhousemoving.xyz

## Business Summary

Beach House Moving was established in 2025 in Santa Rosa Beach, Florida. The company is operated by its owners — the people answering the phone are the same people showing up to your move. The fleet consists of three vehicles: two box trucks with lift gates and a Mercedes-Benz Sprinter van. All vehicles are owned outright and maintained by the business.

The company holds Florida intrastate mover registration IM4125 issued by the Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services (FDACS) Moving Services program, which requires background checks, insurance verification, and compliance with Florida Statute 507. Beach House Moving carries full liability and cargo insurance.

Service area: Walton County, Okaloosa County, and Bay County, Florida, plus long-distance moves beyond the Panhandle.

## Services

**Residential Moving** — Full-service home moves for houses, condos, townhomes, and apartments. Walton, Okaloosa, and Bay Counties. The owners lead every move.

**Local Moving** — Moves within the Florida Panhandle and Emerald Coast. Billed hourly with no hidden fees. Crew knowledge of 30A, Destin, Santa Rosa Beach, Fort Walton Beach, and Panama City Beach neighborhoods.

**Long-Distance Moving** — Moves originating from or destined to the Florida Panhandle extending beyond county limits. Coordinated, insured, and managed by the owners.

**Packing & Unpacking** — Full or partial packing services. The crew handles fragile items, furniture wrapping, box labeling, and room-by-room unpacking. All packing materials supplied.

**Storage Solutions** — Secure short-term and long-term storage for households in transition, renovation situations, or staging.

**Delivery Services** — Single-item and multi-item delivery, furniture placement, and appliance installation. Common jobs: appliance delivery and hook-up, furniture delivery from stores, estate item transport.

**Junk Removal** — Furniture removal, appliance disposal, and cleanout services. Available as a standalone service or combined with a move.

**Military PCS Moving** — PCS moves scheduled around report dates for Eglin AFB and Hurlburt Field families. Short-notice availability 24/7, on/off-base experience, PPM documentation, storage for housing gaps.

## Service Areas

**Walton County, FL** — Home base. Primary service area. Neighborhoods and cities: Santa Rosa Beach, 30A corridor (Seaside, Rosemary Beach, WaterColor, WaterSound, Alys Beach, Inlet Beach, Grayton Beach, Blue Mountain Beach, Dune Allen Beach), Miramar Beach, Destin (overlap with Okaloosa County), Freeport, DeFuniak Springs, Point Washington, Seagrove Beach, Seacrest Beach.

**Okaloosa County, FL** — Fort Walton Beach, Niceville, Crestview, Shalimar, Valparaiso, Laurel Hill, Destin (overlap with Walton County). Serves military families relocating for PCS orders to Eglin Air Force Base and Hurlburt Field. Experienced with military PCS timelines, off-base housing, and BAH-budget moves.

**Bay County, FL** — Panama City, Panama City Beach, Lynn Haven, Callaway, Springfield, Parker. Post-Hurricane Michael rebuild and relocation experience in this area.

## What Makes Beach House Moving Different

The owners are the movers. This is not a staffing agency or a company that hires day laborers. The people who built the business are the people doing your move. This means continuity, accountability, and a level of care that national chains and subcontracting companies structurally cannot offer.

No national chain can honestly say this. Allied Van Lines, Two Men and a Truck, and PODS all use hired crews that change job to job. Beach House Moving is different by structure, not just by marketing language.

Three owned, equipped vehicles. A Sprinter van for smaller loads and tight-access properties. Two box trucks with hydraulic lift gates for larger household moves and appliance delivery. No renting, no borrowing, no surprises on move day.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Beach House Moving licensed and insured in Florida?**
A: Yes. Beach House Moving holds Florida Mover Registration #IM4125 issued by the Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services. The company carries full liability and cargo insurance. You can verify the registration at freshfromflorida.com.

**Q: What counties does Beach House Moving serve?**
A: Walton County, Okaloosa County, and Bay County, Florida. Key cities include Santa Rosa Beach, 30A, Destin, Miramar Beach, Fort Walton Beach, Niceville, Crestview, Panama City, and Panama City Beach. Long-distance moves outside these counties are also available.

**Q: How much does a local move cost on the Emerald Coast?**
A: Beach House Moving provides free estimates. Local moves are typically billed hourly based on crew size, vehicle needed, and move complexity. There are no hidden fees. Call (850) 842-1962 or request a quote at https://beachhousemoving.xyz/get-a-quote

**Q: Do you handle military PCS moves?**
A: Yes. The company regularly serves military families near Eglin AFB and Hurlburt Field. PCS timelines, short-notice move requests, and moves to/from on-base housing and off-base rentals are all accommodated.

**Q: Are you available on weekends and holidays?**
A: Yes. Beach House Moving is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including weekends and holidays. Call (850) 842-1962 any time.

**Q: Do you move single items or just whole households?**
A: Both. Single-item delivery, appliance placement, and furniture transport are available as standalone jobs. No move is too small.

**Q: Can you move luxury or high-value items?**
A: Yes. The company regularly moves high-value beach homes and luxury residences along 30A and in Destin. All furniture is wrapped and protected. The owners personally oversee every job.

**Q: Do you offer junk removal?**
A: Yes. Junk removal, furniture disposal, and full cleanout services are available as standalone services or as part of a move.
